zh.lifeSummary: 當Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire於大約1208年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，她的父親Llywelyn ab Iorwerth35歲，母親Joan Lady of Wales21歲。她於1219年與John de Braose在英國英格蘭諾福爾可海頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1267年10月28日在英國賀福爾克利福德享年60歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾阿可波瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire于大约1208年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾时，她的父亲Llywelyn ab Iorwerth35岁，母亲Joan Lady of Wales21岁。她于1219年与John de Braose在英国英格兰諾福爾可海頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1267年10月28日在英国賀福爾克利福德享年60岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾阿可波瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Margred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire was born about 1208, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, her father, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, was 35 and her mother, Joan Lady of Wales, was 21. She married John de Braose in 1219, in Heydon, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 28 October 1267, in Clifford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Aconbury, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire est née environ 1208, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan Lady of Wales, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John de Braose en 1219, à Heydon, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 28 octobre 1267, à Clifford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Aconbury, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire um 1208 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Llywelyn ab Iorwerth 35 und ihre Mutter Joan Lady of Wales 21. Sie hat 1219 in Heydon, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom John de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 28. Oktober 1267 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Clifford, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Aconbury, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire è nata il circa 1208 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, sua padre, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Joan Lady of Wales, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John de Braose nel 1219, nel Heydon, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 28 ottobre 1267, nel Clifford, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Aconbury, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshireが約1208年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Llywelyn ab Iorwerthは35歳，母Joan Lady of Walesは21歳であった。1219年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヘイドンでJohn de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1267年10月28日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクリフォードで60歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアコンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire(이)가 대략 1208년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llywelyn ab Iorwerth(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Lady of Wales(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 헤이던에서 John de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 10월 28일 영국 허퍼드실르 클리퍼드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 악버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire nasceu aproximadamente 1208, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan Lady of Wales, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Braose em 1219, em Heydon, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1267, em Clifford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Aconbury, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Cistercian abbey of Aberconwy, Conwy, Ca: Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire родилась около 1208 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Llywelyn ab Iorwerth было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Lady of Wales, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Braose в 1219 г. в местности хидон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 28 октября 1267 г. в местности клиффорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности аконбури, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire nació aproximadamente 1208, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joan Lady of Wales, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John de Braose en 1219, en Heydon, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1267, en Clifford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Aconbury, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
